title: codereview pass 3: test vectors and roundtrip not updated for channel
description: rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs:182 - make_announce still uses 93 bytes, no channel byte at [93], roundtrip test doesn't assert or set current_channel= e.g. 2 per ccp9.json. Will fail after fix. Also update should_relay doc. P2. codereview
